parameters.query:
SELECT 
  l.id AS lead_id,
  l.email,
  l.first_name,
  l.last_name,
  l.budget,
  l.timeline,
  l.financing_type,
  l.phone,
  l.viewing_requested,
  l.property_id,
  l.lead_score AS current_score,
  l.status,
  l.submitted_at,
  -- Activity signals
  COUNT(DISTINCT li.id) AS page_views,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN li.interaction_type = 'property_view' THEN li.id END) AS property_views,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN li.interaction_type = 'saved_property' THEN li.id END) AS saved_properties,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN li.interaction_type = 'email_open' THEN li.id END) AS email_opens,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN li.interaction_type = 'email_click' THEN li.id END) AS email_clicks,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN li.interaction_type = 'viewing_request' THEN li.id END) AS viewing_requests,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN li.interaction_type = 'callback_request' THEN li.id END) AS callback_requests,
  MAX(li.created_at) AS last_interaction
FROM leads l
LEFT JOIN lead_interactions li ON li.lead_id = l.id
WHERE l.status NOT IN ('converted', 'lost', 'unsubscribed')
GROUP BY l.id, l.email, l.first_name, l.last_name, l.budget, l.timeline, 
         l.financing_type, l.phone, l.viewing_requested, l.property_id,
         l.lead_score, l.status, l.submitted_at
HAVING l.id IS NOT NULL;

UPDATE leads 
SET 
  lead_score = {{ $json.new_score }},
  lead_tier = '{{ $json.tier }}',
  score_breakdown = '{{ $json.score_breakdown }}',
  score_updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = {{ $json.lead_id }}
RETURNING id, email, lead_score, lead_tier;
